visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with light blonde hair, wearing a black T-shirt with a cartoon graphic, sits at a wooden table in a brightly lit restaurant. In front of him is a sizzling cast-iron plate featuring a steak, a fried egg, and noodles. The background shows blurred restaurant patrons and warm interior lighting. (2) A close-up shot focuses on the steak where a small black rectangular flag is stuck. The flag has white printed text in both Chinese and English. (3) The man points toward the sizzling plate with his index finger while looking directly at the camera with an enthusiastic expression and moving his lips. (4) The man uses chopsticks to pick up a piece of the steak and places it into his mouth. He chews with a visibly strained facial expression, squinting his eyes as if the meat is difficult to masticate. Colorful graphic overlays and question mark icons appear near his face.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 這牛排真貼心 還有告示耶. (2) [Slogan]: 先吃這塊避免過熟 EAT FIRST!. (3) [Subtitle]: 先吃這塊避免過熟. [Variety]: 貼心 貼心. (4) [Variety]: ?. [Subtitle]: 呃 真的有點熟耶. (5) [Subtitle]: 真的硬硬der. (6) [Variety]: 北七喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male character sitting at the table.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young male with dyed blonde/light brown hair wearing a black graphic T-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A restaurant interior with wooden tables, warm ceiling lights, and other customers blurred in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic male voice speaks in a high-pitched Mandarin dialect over a bright, fast-tempo electronic BGM with a consistent 4/4 beat. The tone is enthusiastic and celebratory. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect coincides with the visual transition to the steak close-up, while the BGM continues seamlessly. (3) The speaker's vocal tone shifts to a comedic, slightly strained quality as he reacts to the texture of the food. A 'slide whistle' or comical SFX emphasizes his struggle to chew. (4) A final cartoon-style 'boing' sound effect concludes the audio track as the vocal intensity peaks in a humorous complaint.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously review a restaurant gimmick where a flag suggests the meat should be eaten first to avoid overcooking, only for the reviewer to find the meat already tough and overcooked.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator criticizes the quality of the food (too hard/well-done), which is typical of an honest review rather than a paid endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical variety-show editing styles common in East Asian social media content to enhance comedic effect.
